item.title: ドローイング連数１０８ 顔のまとめ・アゴの輪郭 アゴを引くと、あごの面積が減る。 キャラ設定であごの輪郭は重要。ヴァリエ…
item.author: 多田 洋介 (@yoppy1228.bsky.social)
item.description:
ドローイング連数１０８　顔のまとめ・アゴの輪郭
アゴを引くと、あごの面積が減る。
キャラ設定であごの輪郭は重要。ヴァリエーションとシルエットをよく確認する。

前の読み切り漫画では何度描き直してもキャラの作画が上手くいかないコマがあった。基本形からどうやって変化させているのか、キャラごと設定をしっかりする。
いわゆるキャラデザだな。
item.content:encoded:
ドローイング連数１０８　顔のまとめ・アゴの輪郭
アゴを引くと、あごの面積が減る。
キャラ設定であごの輪郭は重要。ヴァリエーションとシルエットをよく確認する。

前の読み切り漫画では何度描き直してもキャラの作画が上手くいかないコマがあった。基本形からどうやって変化させているのか、キャラごと設定をしっかりする。
いわゆるキャラデザだな。

item.title: パライバトルマリンリング💍 パライバトルマリンは、人間関係を良好にし、人気を高めるパワーを持つ石と言われています。 こ…
item.author: 有限会社マツヤマ【公式】宝石・時計 松山/雅-miyabiｰ/CENTREMILE (@jw-matsuyama.bsky.social)
item.description:
パライバトルマリンリング💍
パライバトルマリンは、人間関係を良好にし、人気を高めるパワーを持つ石と言われています。
この他にはない蛍光色も人気の理由です。

#ジュエリー　#宝石　#指輪　#リング　#ネックレス　#ペンダント　#石沼　#洛北阪急スクエア　#亀岡市　#ジュエリーリフォーム　#オーダージュエリー　#地金買取
item.content:encoded:
パライバトルマリンリング💍
パライバトルマリンは、人間関係を良好にし、人気を高めるパワーを持つ石と言われています。
この他にはない蛍光色も人気の理由です。

#ジュエリー　#宝石　#指輪　#リング　#ネックレス　#ペンダント　#石沼　#洛北阪急スクエア　#亀岡市　#ジュエリーリフォーム　#オーダージュエリー　#地金買取

item.title: コテンラジオで、アメリカ史のリバイバリスト（信仰復興運動）の話を聞いて、Appleさんの録画形式のキーノートは、短期的に…
item.author: hann-solo (@hnsol.bsky.social)
item.description:
コテンラジオで、アメリカ史のリバイバリスト（信仰復興運動）の話を聞いて、Appleさんの録画形式のキーノートは、短期的には効果的だけど、中長期的に影響力を毀損するなど思った。
のだけど、ロジックを忘れてしまった
item.content:encoded:
コテンラジオで、アメリカ史のリバイバリスト（信仰復興運動）の話を聞いて、Appleさんの録画形式のキーノートは、短期的には効果的だけど、中長期的に影響力を毀損するなど思った。
のだけど、ロジックを忘れてしまった

item.title: 台風消滅したらしいですね🌀 とはいえ雨は続くみたいなので、ジメジメとは付き合っていかねば😫 土曜の夜、夜更かしして…
item.author: 白川えま✨Aroma Levante (@emalevante.bsky.social)
item.description:
台風消滅したらしいですね🌀
とはいえ雨は続くみたいなので、ジメジメとは付き合っていかねば😫

土曜の夜、夜更かししてるお兄様🥰
よかったらオイルマッサージで癒されに来ませんか✨
この後2:00までDMお返事できませんので、ご予約の方はお店まで📞

お待ちしております(*´˘`*)♡

item.title: ベネズエラの連続大地震、死者1400人超える 行方不明者数万人か www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZ…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
ベネズエラの連続大地震、死者1400人超える　行方不明者数万人か
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

負傷者は約3200人。

被災地は電力や通信などのインフラにも被害が及んでいるため、情報が入り乱れています。

#ニュース
item.content:encoded:
ベネズエラの連続大地震、死者1400人超える　行方不明者数万人か
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

負傷者は約3200人。

被災地は電力や通信などのインフラにも被害が及んでいるため、情報が入り乱れています。

#ニュース

item.title: Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began co…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:
item.content:encoded:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:

item.title: ローリー・アンダーソンが 京都賞を受賞されたそうです おめでとうございます🍾 彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード 俺の太極…
item.author: 翻訳の吉田俊太郎 (@shuntaroyoshida.bsky.social)
item.description:
ローリー・アンダーソンが
京都賞を受賞されたそうです
おめでとうございます🍾

彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード　俺の太極拳』(国書刊行会)も面白いですよ。
ご興味ある方はぜひ！
item.content:encoded:
ローリー・アンダーソンが
京都賞を受賞されたそうです
おめでとうございます🍾

彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード　俺の太極拳』(国書刊行会)も面白いですよ。
ご興味ある方はぜひ！

item.title: Babies born by cesarean section don’t get the rich blend of …
item.author: Science Magazine (@science.org)
item.description:
Babies born by cesarean section don’t get the rich blend of microbes that come from a vaginal birth—microbes that may help prevent disorders such as asthma and allergies.

Research from 2020 suggests a way to change that. #WorldMicrobiomeDay https://scim.ag/3SuRNYG
item.content:encoded:
Babies born by cesarean section don’t get the rich blend of microbes that come from a vaginal birth—microbes that may help prevent disorders such as asthma and allergies.

Research from 2020 suggests a way to change that. #WorldMicrobiomeDay https://scim.ag/3SuRNYG

item.title: “You cannot make billions of dollars without hurting lots of…
item.author: Gwyllm Llwydd (@gwyllm.bsky.social)
item.description: “You cannot make billions of dollars without hurting lots of people. And you can’t hurt lots of people without, in some sense, believing that they’re not really people.” Corey Doctorow
item.content:encoded: “You cannot make billions of dollars without hurting lots of people. And you can’t hurt lots of people without, in some sense, believing that they’re not really people.” Corey Doctorow

item.title: My hydrangeas have never been this huge, for the first time …
item.author: Michele (@burienwino.bsky.social)
item.description: My hydrangeas have never been this huge, for the first time in 20 years, they're so big the squirrels just walk on them and I can't see any of the pots/water features I have back there for the birds. It's been one hell of growing season in Seattle for some reason.
item.content:encoded: My hydrangeas have never been this huge, for the first time in 20 years, they're so big the squirrels just walk on them and I can't see any of the pots/water features I have back there for the birds. It's been one hell of growing season in Seattle for some reason.

item.title: This is Mace. He has one of the squishiest sugar faces we've…
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: This is Mace. He has one of the squishiest sugar faces we've ever seen, and has only gotten squishier with age. 14/10 like fine wine #SeniorPupSaturday (IG: wrinkledogmace)
item.content:encoded: This is Mace. He has one of the squishiest sugar faces we've ever seen, and has only gotten squishier with age. 14/10 like fine wine #SeniorPupSaturday (IG: wrinkledogmace)

item.title: Mamdani just showed up at Penn Station, wristbands in hand, …
item.author: Luca Migo ❌👑 (@victinibcn.bsky.social)
item.description: Mamdani just showed up at Penn Station, wristbands in hand, helping World Cup fans find their trains like it was nothing. Panama vs England, MetLife bound, and the mayor was just out there in the crowd. No big deal. Very big deal.
item.content:encoded: Mamdani just showed up at Penn Station, wristbands in hand, helping World Cup fans find their trains like it was nothing. Panama vs England, MetLife bound, and the mayor was just out there in the crowd. No big deal. Very big deal.

item.title: Night night sweet dreamies 🌙✨ Whatever today held, leave i…
item.author: George The Station Cat (@george-station-cat.bsky.social)
item.description:
Night night sweet dreamies 🌙✨

Whatever today held, leave it here. Tomorrow doesn’t ask you to be perfect, only to keep going.

Rest well, you’ve done enough for today
item.content:encoded:
Night night sweet dreamies 🌙✨

Whatever today held, leave it here. Tomorrow doesn’t ask you to be perfect, only to keep going.

Rest well, you’ve done enough for today

item.title: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White H…
item.author: Barack Obama (@barackobama.bsky.social)
item.description: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White House. They were powerful reminders of why the work we did mattered, and who we were fighting for.
item.content:encoded: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White House. They were powerful reminders of why the work we did mattered, and who we were fighting for.

item.title: No Road Signs just Me Lost in the Middle #Photography #Beach…
item.author: Mira🌺 (@deepgreens.bsky.social)
item.description: No Road Signs just Me Lost in the Middle #Photography #BeachLife #Nature
item.content:encoded: No Road Signs just Me Lost in the Middle #Photography #BeachLife #Nature

item.title: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, …
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, a source of oxygen, a support for rainfall, and a sanctuary for birds. It is a safeguard for our future. When we cut down trees, we lose more than just greenery; we invite heat, drought, pollution, and suffering. 🌳 Save trees. Save lives.
item.content:encoded: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, a source of oxygen, a support for rainfall, and a sanctuary for birds. It is a safeguard for our future. When we cut down trees, we lose more than just greenery; we invite heat, drought, pollution, and suffering. 🌳 Save trees. Save lives.

item.title: Missouri’s governor opposes outside influence — while backin…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Missouri’s governor opposes outside influence — while backing a measure bankrolled by out-of-state funds.

“The fact that the governor is benefiting directly from … a dark money group from Delaware … shouldn’t be lost on anyone,” a critic said.
item.content:encoded:
Missouri’s governor opposes outside influence — while backing a measure bankrolled by out-of-state funds.

“The fact that the governor is benefiting directly from … a dark money group from Delaware … shouldn’t be lost on anyone,” a critic said.

item.title: Take Texas to court. You can't force your warped religious b…
item.author: Lawrence (@ldog562.bsky.social)
item.description:
Take Texas to court. You can't force your warped religious beliefs on another full stop,
Texas mandates Bible readings and Christian-infused curriculum in public schools.
www.salon.com/2026/06/27/t...
item.content:encoded:
Take Texas to court. You can't force your warped religious beliefs on another full stop,

item.title: "As God as my witness, when I turn 13 and get my lawn mowing…
item.author: SeaTea (@tierno158.bsky.social)
item.description: "As God as my witness, when I turn 13 and get my lawn mowing business going I'm never letting my Mom cut my hair again!"
item.content:encoded: "As God as my witness, when I turn 13 and get my lawn mowing business going I'm never letting my Mom cut my hair again!"

item.title: . When you spend hours looking for your little black kitten …
item.author: Marko Silberhand (@markosilberhand.bsky.social)
item.description:
.
When you spend hours looking for your little black kitten . . .

... and suddenly...

💙 👁️👁️ 💙

Happy Caturday 😊
item.content:encoded:
.
When you spend hours looking for your little black kitten . . .

... and suddenly...

💙 👁️👁️ 💙

Happy Caturday 😊
